name: telemetry-watcher
command: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; const p = path.resolve('${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/telemetry.log'); if (!fs.existsSync(p)) { fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p), {recursive: true}); fs.writeFileSync(p, ''); } let size = fs.statSync(p).size; setInterval(() => { const s = fs.statSync(p).size; if (s > size) { const fd = fs.openSync(p, 'r'); const buf = Buffer.alloc(s - size); fs.readSync(fd, buf, 0, s - size, size); fs.closeSync(fd); process.stdout.write(buf.toString()); size = s; } }, 500);"
description: Hook execution telemetry — surfaces errors and slow hooks in real time (cross-platform)

name: python-test-watcher
description: Skill script tests — live feedback during skill development
